eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Kentucky; Daviess; Fayette; Franklin; Madison; Ohio, KY; at 8:50 PM on JUN 27, 2026 Effective until 9:05 PM. Message from KYEOC.
